UserProgress.title: User API Progress
UserProgress.description: Stores user SRS vocabulary progress as a single document

srsData.description: Dictionary of word ID mapping to SRS state

AiTip.title: AI Tip Cache
AiTip.description: Cached AI-generated mnemonic tips for Arabic vocabulary words

user_progress/{userId}.description: User progress data, read/write restricted to the user themselves

ai_tips/{wordId}.description: Shared cache of AI tips keyed by word ID, read/write for any authenticated user
